import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './Services.css'; const Services = () => { const services = [ { id: 1, title: "Accounts & Bookkeeping", description: "Professional bookkeeping services to keep your financial records accurate and up-to-date. We provide comprehensive accounting support to ensure your business maintains clear and accurate financial records.", icon: "📊", features: [ "Monthly bookkeeping and reconciliation", "Quarterly VAT returns", "Annual accounts preparation", "Cloud accounting setup and management", "Real-time financial reporting", "Management accounts", "Financial statements", "Bank reconciliation" ], benefits: [ "Clear visibility of your financial position", "Compliance with HMRC requirements", "Time saved on administrative tasks", "Accurate records for decision-making" ] }, { id: 2, title: "Tax Services", description: "Expert tax planning and compliance services to minimize your tax liability legally. Our team provides strategic tax advice to help you keep more of what you earn.", icon: "📋", features: [ "Self-assessment tax returns", "Corporation tax returns", "Tax planning & advice", "HMRC correspondence and representation", "Tax investigation support", "Capital gains tax planning", "Inheritance tax planning", "VAT planning and optimization" ], benefits: [ "Maximize tax efficiency", "Ensure compliance with tax regulations", "Reduce tax liability legally", "Peace of mind with expert support" ] } ]; return (

Our Services

Comprehensive accounting and tax solutions tailored to your business needs

{services.map((service) => (
{service.icon}

{service.title}

{service.description}

What's Included

); }; export default Services;
